spotted.text: We've fallen in with a convoy of {n:3-8} freighters. There's an old tradition: match speed and become an honorary member, or overtake and assert independence.

join.text: Formation joined. The lead freighter flashed its lights in welcome. For the next stretch, we are convoy. We are family. We are slightly slower than we'd like.

pass-clean.text: Overtake executed flawlessly. The convoy salutes our audacity. One driver mouthed 'nice ship.' Day: made.

pass-drama.text: Overtake complete, but the lead freighter has taken it personally. Expect to see them again at every rest stop for the remainder of your natural life.

drift-along.text: No orders received. We drifted alongside the convoy in comfortable ambiguity. Sometimes that's enough.
